app.name: AirSync
home.title: AirSync
onboarding.title: 欢迎使用 AirSync
notifications.empty.title: 已同步完成！
plus.title: AirSync+
plus.why.body:
你的一点小小支持能让我保持动力继续开发，将来甚至有机会发布到 Apple App Store 和 Google Play Store。就当它是让这个项目持续活跃、不断进化的一点小小捐助吧。

我完全理解，并非每位想要体验完整功能的朋友都具备付费条件。如果你正面临这样的状况，请不必顾虑，可以随时与我联系。😊

源代码已在 GitHub 开源，你完全可以用它来构建带有完整 Plus 功能的个人版本，同时也欢迎你贡献代码，这无疑是一种互助共赢的方式。

为感谢你的捐助，AirSync+ 将解锁一些实用的小功能：媒体控制、同步小组件、低电量提醒、无线 ADB、文件浏览，以及更多新功能会陆续加入。

祝你使用愉快！
(っ◕‿◕)っ

settings.pairing.instructions:
In order to pair your device, follow these steps:

1. Go to Android device's Settings -> About phone
2. Tap on "Build number" 7 times to unlcok developer options
3. Go to Settings -> System -> Developer options
4. Look for "USB debugging" and enable
5. Look for "Wireless debugging",  enable and go in
6. Tap on "Pair device with QR code" option and scan the above QR code to authenticate the device. If prompted, Select "Always allow on this network" if prompted.

Done! You are ready to connect.
settings.pairing.troubleshooting.text:
If pairing is failing, please check the following:

• Ensure both devices are connected to the exact same Wi-Fi network.
• Check if you have an active VPN on your Mac or Android device, which can block local network traffic (mDNS).
• Turn Wireless Debugging off and back on in Android Developer options.
• Check if your router blocks Multicast or local network discovery (AP Isolation).
